title: auth.rs: nonce_is_fresh uses u32 timestamp, wraps year 2106
description: auth.rs:27-32: new_challenge() casts the current Unix timestamp to u32, which wraps in year 2106. The staleness check in nonce_is_fresh (lines 48-62) uses u64 arithmetic on the decoded u32, so a nonce generated right before the 2106 wrap and checked right after would decode to near-zero (relative to u64 epoch) and appear ~135 years stale. Not immediately actionable but will silently break auth after 2106. The comment 'sufficient until year 2106' is accurate; this is a known deadline that should be tracked.
